title: User Feedback Collection Pipeline Health (Art. 72)

compliance.assurance_rationale: Auto-migrated from cat-22 markdown on Phase 1.3 run, then normalised in Phase A (clause 'EU AI Act' → 'Art.13'). Requires SME review to confirm clause accuracy, mode (satisfies vs detects-violation-of), and assurance level (contributing/partial/full).

app: Splunk ITSI (1841), Splunk Common Information Model Add-on (1621)
spl:
index=app sourcetype="app:feedback" earliest=-7d
| eval ok=if(http_status>=200 AND http_status<300,1,0)
| timechart span=1h sum(ok) as ok_ct, count as total
| eval ok_rate=round(100*ok_ct/total,2)
| where ok_rate < 95
value: Monitors volume and error rate of in-app feedback submissions for post-market user feedback collection integrity.
implementation: (1) Add HEC token per environment; (2) dedupe by feedback_id; (3) alert drops >20% vs baseline; (4) map to product owner.
visualization: Time chart (ok_rate), Single value (7d avg ok_rate), Table (hours below 95%)
cimSpl: | tstats summariesonly=t count from datamodel=Web.Web by Web.status, Web.http_method, Web.dest span=1h | sort - count
knownFalsePositives: Administrative tasks, scheduled jobs or platform updates can match this pattern — correlate with change management, maintenance windows and user role before raising severity.
